title: Throwing Sand│投沙
description: Now, the Husk has a big advantage in the Desert, as it can throw Sand.│現在，屍殼在沙漠中具有很大的優勢，因為它可以投擲沙子。
body:
# Function│功能
If there is sand or red sand around, the husk will throw it at the enemy. The sand will cause 2 seconds of blindness and 2.5 physical damage when it hits the creature.│如果四周有沙子或紅沙，屍殼會將擲向敵人，沙子擊中生物後會造成2秒失明以及2.5物理傷害。
# Suggestion│建議
Since the blindness effect only affects players, I strongly recommend that you also install my other datapack [Universal Blindness](https://modrinth.com/datapack/universal-blindness), which will make the husk's sand throwing attack more effective against non-player mobs.│由於失明效果只對玩家有效，因此我強烈建議您同時安裝我的另一個資料包[通用失明](https://modrinth.com/datapack/universal-blindness)，這會讓屍殼的投沙攻擊對於非玩家生物更有效。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
